title: Adam Walker (rugby league)
extract: Adam Walker (20 February 1991 – 4 October 2022) was a Scotland international rugby league prop. At club level he played for the Huddersfield Giants, Hull Kingston Rovers, St Helens, Wakefield Trinity and the Salford Red Devils in the Super League, and on loan from Huddersfield at the Barrow Raiders and the Swinton Lions in the Championship.
